content.text:
Hi there! 👋

I'm here to help you with various tasks, such as:

- Reading, writing, and searching files
- Executing commands
- Exploring directories
- And more!

What can I help you with today?

I'm an AI assistant designed to help you with various tasks like:

- File operations (read, write, search)
- Running commands
- Exploring directories
- General questions and conversations

I'm here to assist you! What would you like to work on?

messages.content: 你能看到你自己的路径吗

content.text:
让我查一下我当前的位置：
<minimax:tool_call>
<invoke name="exec">
<parameter name="command">pwd</parameter>
</invoke>
</minimax:tool_call>
